name: io.github.us-all/unifi
description: UniFi semantic-analysis MCP — fleet health, anomaly detection, cross-site analytics

environmentVariables.name: UNIFI_API_URL
environmentVariables.description: UniFi Site Manager API base URL (default: https://api.ui.com).

environmentVariables.name: UNIFI_API_KEY_OWNER
environmentVariables.description: Optional label identifying which user/account owns the API key — surfaced in audit logs.

environmentVariables.name: UNIFI_TOOLS
environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated category allowlist. Default: all categories enabled.
